## How I tested it

Commands run:

```bash
pnpm lint
pnpm format:check
pnpm typecheck
pnpm test:unit
pnpm test:integration
pnpm build

```

For UI changes, include screenshots or a short recording.

## Checklist
 I worked on a branch, not directly on main.
 I ran the required checks locally.
 I added or updated tests where needed.
